SpringFirst/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven build to include XML files from src/main/resources directory.

SpringFirst/target/classes/META-INF/mave.general_idea: Configure Maven build to explicitly include XML files from the resources directory.

SpringFirst/.settings/org.eclipse.core.r.general_idea: Explicitly set UTF-8 encoding for the main resources directory in Eclipse project settings.

SpringFirst/src/main/resources/spring.xm.general_idea: Restructured Spring XML bean definitions to use explicit property references instead of autowiring and improved formatting.
SpringFirst/src/main/resources/spring.xm.human_impl: Removed autowire='byType' from Ferrari bean, added <property name='e' ref='Engine'/>, and fixed indentation/closing tags.

SpringFirst/target/classes/spring.xml.general_idea: Restructured Spring XML bean definitions to use explicit property references instead of autowiring and improved formatting.
SpringFirst/target/classes/spring.xml.human_impl: Removed autowire='byType' from Ferrari bean and added explicit <property name='e' ref='Engine'/>; reformatted indentation and comments.
